form.formComment: Has been in the money at last three starts, the latest at big odds when third (23.12) at Warragul. Boxed the fence this time. Cannot be ruled out.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Crossed to outside in home straight.

form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 7 length second (27.61) over 485m at Horsham. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth on March 27 over 425m at this track behind Reckless, beaten 5.5 lengths (24.39) in a Grade 5. Not far from winner last time but has the job ahead here.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by a nose over 390m at Ballarat in a handy (22.37), beating Aston Rochelle. Will find this a bit tougher, prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at the last two runs, both at Shepparton, the latest when beaten 6 lengths behind Mystifying Lomar over 390m. Others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd on April 12 over 435m at Sale behind Dr. Paris beaten 2.5 lengths (24.82) in a Restricted WIN. Has clocked a fast 23.95 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Grade 4/5 on April 5 over 425m at this track behind She's Primed beaten 10 lengths (24.61). Has clocked a slick 24 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: At the last start finished last in a Grade 5 on April 12 over 350m at Healesville behind Periodical beaten 6 lengths (19.81). Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage eighth but before that won by 2.25 lengths at Geelong (22.67) beating Paw Xanthie in a Grade 5 on April 3. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Facing tougher opposition than she has faced recent starts and current form just not to what is required to figure. Needs to do more. Others better.
